Who We Are

About

A studio built for scale.

HS108 was founded in 2019 on a single thesis: that most design studios are either too big to care or too small to be reliable. We built something in between — small enough to be invested, structured enough to deliver.

We work with companies at inflection points. Seed-stage startups about to launch. Growth-stage companies whose brand no longer fits their ambition. Enterprises that need their product design system rebuilt from scratch.

What we're not: a generalist shop that does anything for anyone. We do brand, product, and systems — and we do them exceptionally.

2019 Founded
38+ Clients Served
100% Senior Team
HS108 Independent

Our Values

What We Stand For

01

Systems First

We design things that scale. Every decision is made with the long game in mind — not just the launch, but the second version, the pivot, and the growth that comes after.

02

Senior Always

No bait-and-switch. The people you meet in the pitch are the people doing the work. Every project is led by someone with real experience, not supervised by them.

03

Small on Purpose

We deliberately stay small. It keeps us sharp, invested, and close to the work. Big agencies have overhead. We have attention.

04

Honest Work

We'll tell you if something doesn't work — even if it's your idea. Good design is a conversation, not a service delivery. We'd rather be right than agreeable.

Who We've Worked With

NovaPayUrbane PropertyHealthOSLuma CommerceMedFlowVeritasAIPocketScaleOrbitEd

Start a Project

Let's build something together.

We're currently accepting new projects. Tell us what you're working on.
